popularStory.description: The first record we have of him is as a merchant in Leyden, Holland. He was a memeber of the Separatist group or church. He was made a freeman of the city of Leyden in 1614. He was a very enterprising …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Isaac Allerton於大約1586年出生在英國素福爾可易亞斯特 波爾特時，他的父親Bartholomew Allerton33歲，母親Mary33歲。他於1611年11月4日與Mary Norris在荷蘭霍蘭萊登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1632年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文且於1636年住在尼福 內德藍德劍橋大學默里 阿姆斯特爾達姆。他在英國米德萊可倫敦被列為tailor。他去世於1659年2月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂享年74歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂特 邱奇 奧 馮 格林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isaac Allerton于大约1586年出生在英国素福爾可易亞斯特 波爾特时，他的父亲Bartholomew Allerton33岁，母亲Mary33岁。他于1611年11月4日与Mary Norris在荷兰霍蘭萊登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1632年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文且于1636年住在尼福 內德藍德劍橋大學默里 阿姆斯特爾達姆。他在英国米德萊可倫敦被列为tailor。他去世于1659年2月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂享年74岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂特 邱奇 奧 馮 格林。

nameMeanings.name: Allerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of several places so called. Allerton on Merseyside, Chapel Allerton in Yorkshire, and others in Yorkshire were named in Old English as alra tūn ‘settlement by the alders’. One in Somerset (Alwarditone in Domesday Book) is ‘Ælfweard's settlement’; one in Yorkshire (Allerton Mauleverer, Alvertone in Domesday Book) is ‘Ælfhere's settlement’.

variants.name: Alderton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of a number of places called Alderton. Those in Suffolk and Shropshire (Alretuna in Domesday Book) are named with Old English alor + tūn, meaning ‘the settlement by the alders’. Those in Gloucestershire, Northamptonshire, and Wiltshire are named with the Old English personal name Ealdhere, meaning ‘settlement associated with Ealdhere’. The one in Essex contains a different personal name, probably the woman's name Æthelwaru. In England, the surname is most common in East Anglia, making the places in Suffolk and Essex the most likely sources.

nameMeanings.name: Isaac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the son of Abraham, who was nearly sacrificed by his father according to a command of God which was changed at the last moment. A ram, caught in a nearby thicket, was sacrificed instead (Genesis 22:1–13). Isaac lived on to marry Rebecca and become the father of Esau and Jacob. The derivation of the name is not certain; it has traditionally been connected with the Hebrew verb meaning ‘to laugh’. It was borne by both Christians and Jews in the Middle Ages and was taken up by the Puritans in the 16th century.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.description: Britain waged wars against the Dutch.
Rembrandt Harmenszoon van Rijn was born in Leiden, the Netherlands.
In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.
On April 24, 1638, a company of five-hundred English Puritans led by the Reverend John Davenport and Theophilus Eaton, a wealthy London merchant, sailed into the harbor.
Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.
End of Eighty Years' War with Spain.

en.lifeSummary: When Isaac Allerton was born about 1586, in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England, his father, Bartholomew Allerton, was 33 and his mother, Mary, was 33. He married Mary Norris on 4 November 1611, in Leiden, Holland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America in 1632 and New Amsterdam, New Netherland in 1636. His occupation is listed as tailor in London, Middlesex, England. He died in February 1659, in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 74, and was buried in Center Church on the Green, Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isaac Allerton est né environ 1586, à East Bergholt, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Bartholomew Allerton, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Mary Norris le 4 novembre 1611, à Leiden, Holland, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1632 et à New Amsterdam, Nieuw Nederland en 1636. Sa profession de son indiquée est tailor à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Il est décédé en février 1659, à Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Center Church on the Green, Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isaac Allerton um 1586 in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bartholomew Allerton 33 und seine Mutter Mary 33. Er hat am 4. November 1611 in Leiden, Holland, Niederlande Mary Norris geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1632 hat er in New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und 1636 in New Amsterdam, Nieuw Nederland gelebt. sein Beruf ist als tailor in London, Middlesex, England aufgeführt. Er starb im Februar 1659 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Center Church on the Green, Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isaac Allerton è nato il circa 1586 nel East Bergholt, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Bartholomew Allerton, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Mary, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Mary Norris il 4 novembre 1611, nel Leiden, Holland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America nel 1632 e nel New Amsterdam, Nieuw Nederland nel 1636. La sua occupazione è indicata come tailor nel London, Middlesex, England. Morì nel febbraio 1659, nel Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Center Church on the Green, Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Isaac Allertonが約1586年にイギリススフォルクエアスト バーグホルトで生まれた時，父Bartholomew Allertonは33歳，母Maryは33歳であった。1611年11月4日にオランダホーランドレイデンでMary Norrisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1632年にはイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンに，1636年にはニーウウ ネダーランドニュー アムステルダムに住んでいた。イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでの職業はtailorと記録されている。彼は1659年2月にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンで74歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンセンター チャーチ オン ス グレンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isaac Allerton(이)가 대략 1586년 영국 수폴크 이스트 버고트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bartholomew Allerton(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1611년 11월 4일 네덜란드 홀랜드 레이든에서 Mary Norris(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1632년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐에서, 1636년도에 니우w 네델랜드 뉴 아스터다에서 살았다. 그의 직업은 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 tailor이었다. 그는 1659년 2월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운 세터 처르치  테 그린에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isaac Allerton nasceu aproximadamente 1586, em East Bergholt, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Bartholomew Allerton, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mary, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Norris em 4 de novembro de 1611, em Leiden, Holland, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America em 1632 e em New Amsterdam, Nieuw Nederland em 1636. Sua profissão aparece como tailor em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em fevereiro de 1659, em Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Center Church on the Green, Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isaac Allerton родился около 1586 г. в местности эаст бирголт, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Bartholomew Allerton было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mary, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Norris 4 ноября 1611 г. в местности лиден, холланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1632 году и в местности ню амстирдам, ниеув недирланд в 1636 году.  Он работал по профессии tailor в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. Он умер февраль 1659 г. в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности кентир чурч он т грин, нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isaac Allerton nació aproximadamente 1586, en East Bergholt, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Bartholomew Allerton, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mary, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Mary Norris el 4 de noviembre de 1611, en Leiden, Holland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America en 1632 y en New Amsterdam, Nieuw Nederland en 1636. Su ocupación registrada era tailor en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Murió en febrero de 1659, en Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Center Church on the Green, Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
